records.setup: 1 Lv 1.0 Infantry attacker versus 1 Lv 1.0 Infantry defender. Attacker +10 Attack and +10 Lethality; defender header says +10 Attack, +10 Defense, and +10 Health.

attacker.name: nanomart
troop_passives: Infantry Master Brawler: +10% attack damage to Lancers (applies=False)

defender.name: minimart
hero_skills: Vulcanus Skill 1 L1: -4% enemy Troops Attack
Vulcanus Skill 2 L1: Periodic empowered damage; trigger cadence interpreted as attack events 6, 12, 18, ...
Vulcanus Skill 3 L1: -12% enemy Infantry/Lancer Defense; triggers on turns 1, 4, 7, ...
troop_passives: Infantry Master Brawler: +10% attack damage to Lancers (applies=False)

records.turn_method: vulcanus_proc_count
assumptions: Vulcanus Skill 3 triggers on turns 1, 4, 7, ...; k triggers imply turns in [3k-2, 3k].
Vulcanus Skill 2 trigger count 41 is cross-checked as attack events 6, 12, 18, ... and implies turns in [246, 251].
The chosen value 246 lies in the Skill 2 / Skill 3 intersection [246, 246].
Vulcanus is on the defender side.

records.setup: 1 Lv 1.0 Infantry attacker versus 1 Lv 1.0 Infantry defender. Attacker +10 Attack and +10 Lethality; defender +10 Attack, +20 Defense, and +10 Health.

attacker.name: nanomart
troop_passives: Infantry Master Brawler: +10% attack damage to Lancers (applies=False)

defender.name: minimart
hero_skills: Vulcanus Skill 1 L1: -4% enemy Troops Attack
Vulcanus Skill 2 L1: Periodic empowered damage; trigger cadence interpreted as attack events 6, 12, 18, ...
Vulcanus Skill 3 L1: -12% enemy Infantry/Lancer Defense; triggers on turns 1, 4, 7, ...
troop_passives: Infantry Master Brawler: +10% attack damage to Lancers (applies=False)

records.turn_method: vulcanus_proc_count
assumptions: Vulcanus Skill 3 triggers on turns 1, 4, 7, ...; k triggers imply turns in [3k-2, 3k].
Vulcanus Skill 2 trigger count 40 is cross-checked as attack events 6, 12, 18, ... and implies turns in [240, 245].
The chosen value 242 lies in the Skill 2 / Skill 3 intersection [241, 243].
Vulcanus is on the defender side.
